column14: Scaffolds a new AI/ML project. Run ai-setup new-project from shell for new projects.
Gathers domain knowledge via web and internal sources.
Performs exploratory data analysis and establishes a baseline.
Selects the modelling paradigm and designs the experiment stack.
Breaks down architecture into INF-* and EXP-* tasks.
Builds data pipelines training/fit loops and eval harness.
Executes training/fit runs against the TECHSPEC.
Analyzes experiment results against TECHSPEC tiers.
Audits and amends all upstream docs.
Searches past experiments for validated parameters.
Adapts model for production and V&V.
